nasb.text: So Jonathan made a covenant with the house of David, saying, “May the Lord require it at the hands of David’s enemies.”

esv.text: And Jonathan made a covenant with the house of David, saying, “May the Lord take vengeance on David’s enemies.”

cnv.text: 於是約拿單與大衛家立盟約，說：“願耶和華藉大衛仇敵的手追討違背盟約的罪。”

ccb.text: 于是，约拿单与大卫家立下盟约，说：“倘若大卫不守盟约，愿耶和华借着仇敌惩罚他。”
